summary: Customer Auth Frontend Batch testing completed successfully. All customer auth flows working correctly including login, password change redirect, session persistence, and middleware protection.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in api.js response interceptor - 401 errors on login pages were incorrectly redirecting users. Added check to skip redirect when already on /login or /customer-login

success_rate.backend: 100% (10 passed, 3 skipped due to test order dependency)

seed_data_creation: Reset test users 8777777777 and 8444444444 with password 123123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer auth batch verified. Key findings: 1) /customer-login route renders CustomerLoginPage correctly on mobile and desktop. 2) Customer login uses real backend /api/auth/customer/login. 3) If login response has must_change_password=true, user is redirected to /customer/change-password. 4) /customer/change-password renders change password screen and posts to real backend /api/auth/customer/change-password. 5) On successful change password, user is redirected to /customer dashboard. 6) PASSWORD_CHANGE_REQUIRED middleware correctly blocks protected endpoints and redirects to change-password page. 7) Existing /login employee login screen still works and is not broken. 8) Customer auth session does not break existing employee auth session flow. 9) Session persistence works after page refresh. 10) Fixed bug where 401 on login pages caused incorrect redirect.

frontend_tests.customer_login_page_mobile: PASS - All elements present, mobile-first design verified
frontend_tests.customer_login_page_desktop: PASS - Centered card layout, good contrast
frontend_tests.customer_change_password_flow: PASS - Successfully changes password and redirects to /customer
frontend_tests.customer_session_persistence: PASS - Session preserved after page refresh
frontend_tests.password_change_required_middleware: PASS - Blocks access to protected routes
frontend_tests.customer_login_error_handling: PASS - Shows error toast, stays on login page
frontend_tests.employee_login_error_handling: PASS - Shows error toast, stays on login page

bug_fixed.issue: 401 response interceptor was redirecting users from customer-login to /login when login failed
bug_fixed.fix: Added check to skip redirect when already on /login or /customer-login paths
